headline: How Investors Are Reacting To News (NWSA) Earnings Slide And Surprisingly Resilient Analyst Optimism
summary: News Corporation reported its fiscal 2026 third-quarter results on May 7, with earnings declining year over year amid cyclical and structural pressures across its portfolio. Despite this earnings softness, analysts remain moderately positive on News Corporation, expecting longer-term improvements in earnings power even as near-term profit momentum remains uneven. We’ll examine how the anticipated earnings decline and still-bullish analyst sentiment might reshape News Corporation’s existing...
